MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-19-2005 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 12/12/05 IS CONTINUED TO 4/17/06 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
